The main vectors that apply to"," ","USDC Lend"," are ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"smart-contract risk"}]," (a bug or upgrade in the vault or the underlying ","ExtraFi"," protocol could cause loss of funds), ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"oracle risk"}]," (mis-priced price feeds can drain a strategy in a single block),"," ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"liquidity risk"}]," (large withdrawals at the wrong moment can clip the share-price), ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"depeg risk"}]," (the underlying ","USDC"," de-pegging from its target value), and"," ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"governance risk"}]," (admin keys, parameter changes, fee switches). Risk levels we display on the site are editorial classifications, not a quantitative model. The full framework, including what each tier means, how we score, and the open questions we leave on the table, lives on the"," ",["$","$L8",null,{"href":"/risk-framework","children":"risk framework page"}],"."]}]]}]]}]]}]
